title: gleichenia pennigera var. lanuginosa
intro: Gleichenia pennigera var. lanuginosa, also known as the woolly chain fern, is a plant species belonging to the family Gleicheniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of the woolly chain fern include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Gleichenia pennigera var. lanuginosa typically involve steaming or decocting the plant material to create a tea or infusion for medicinal use.
